feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)

entry.title: Hunted Hunters
entry.summary:
Author: Ships_HaleWriter

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,287Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: After tragic pasts, Derek Hale and Rowan hunt the monsters the world is too afraid to name—supernatural killers, human predators, and anyone else who deserves to disappear. But when Beacon Hills starts drawing them in, the line between hunter and hunted begins to blur.

entry.title: Born of Fire and Mischief
entry.summary:
Author: TJtheanimelover

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,338Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 115

Summary: Stiles, after being kidnapped by Peter from the Winter Formal to find Derek, decides to stick around the parking garage and drink his woes away. Peter comes back and...activities ensue. Stiles vows never to speak of it again, which only gets easier once they set Peter on fire. Only problem is he's vomiting throughout the day (the morning in morning sickness is a LIE), craving weird things, and is sensitive to smells. Seems like two can't keep a secret if one of them is dead if the other is freaking pregnant! Oh yeah, and Peter comes back from the dead! What's a guy to do?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Remember me
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,825Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 16

Summary: The other teen raised an inquisitive eyebrow at him when Scott called his name, looking entirely surprised that Scott even knew it. Both of the teenagers looked past Scott's shoulder, where the pack was standing united, trying their best not to overwhelm Stiles but anxiously waiting for him to acknowledge them. Maybe with a hug? It had been a long time. "Do you know these people?" the girl inclined her head and whispered into his ear. Her question earned a casual shrug from Stiles, who whispered back a flat, "No."

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 239,399Chapters: 18/18Kudos: 24

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.title: The Shackles That Set Us Free
entry.summary:
Author: asyndetonic

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,469Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 24

Summary: At Beacon Academy, where misery is magic, Stiles chases the power-giving thrill of the forbidden basement. Between the chains that tether the boarding school in interdimensional space, he finds a shackled monster, and a reason to bring his competitive peers together as never before.

entry.title: Tear Open These Wounds (and Call Down the Wolves)
entry.summary:
Author: siriuslymerlin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,634Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 527

Summary: The thing about ADHD medication is it eventually wears off. And when it wears off, you get bored. Bored enough to start doing stupid things, like listening to your father’s police scanner and sneaking out of the house at first mention of a dead body.Stiles Stilinski is not a perfect daughter, or a perfect friend, but she tries.God, does she try.A genderbent/Rule 63!Stiles retelling of Teen Wolf where I work out all my own personal vendetta's against the show. Completely self-indulgent with plenty of liberties taken with the canon. Major change is that Stiles has always been a girl, Allison doesn't die, and Boyd, Erica, and Isaac get the screen time they deserve (and also do not die/get yeeted off the show)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Scott McCall/Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,463Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 314

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.summary:
Author: SterekTw

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,096Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 156

entry.title: The Ties That Bind
entry.summary:
Author: Rnl1993

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,361Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 56

Summary: Dean and Sam grew up stopping by the Stilinski's house throughout the years. When Stiles ends up in the hospital due to a supernatural accident, Papa Stilinski decides to send Stiles with Dean for the summer to get properly trained. After all, he knows Stiles won't stop helping his friends and the best way to prepare him is to be trained by someone whose life is dedicated to dealing with the supernatural.ORThe one where the Winchesters grow up in a drastically different way and are pretty much adopted by the Stilinski's. The Hale's get a happy life rewrite and everything canon is pretty much changed to suit my needs. Originally called 'Echoes in our Lives'

entry.summary:

entry.title: The Beacon Hills Pack House (or, Four Grown Men and a Baby Wolf)
entry.summary:
Author: Owl_actually_writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,456Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 18

Summary: Two years after the war with the Hunters ended, Stiles and Derek are married, Scott and Isaac are living in their guest rooms, and Liam has unofficially (officially) been adopted by the entire chaotic pack. It’s a full house. Between Stiles’ FBI remote work, Derek’s surprising skill as a stay-at-home-werewolf-husband, and Scott trying to ignore that he’s still hopelessly in love with his ex-boyfriend Isaac, something’s got to give. Tonight, it does. Or: The one where Scott finally stops being a martyr and takes what he wants, Liam accidentally walks in on something he can't un-see, and Derek and Stiles have the most normal marriage in Beacon Hills—which is saying something.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: It Was A Stranger Beneath My Face
entry.summary:
Author: The_Lady_Grey

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,562Chapters: 6/13Kudos: 98

Summary: Unknown caller.Okay. Great.Not like it could be the scum of the earth that he’d been hunting across goddamn Narnia or anything. He knew, Stiles knew that he shouldn’t answer it, but at this point he was a glutton for punishment.“Stilinski speaking,” he said, work voice in place despite the way his chest still heaved and his legs burned post-run. The line was silent for a moment.“Stiles?” The voice was familiar and it seemed shocked that he had picked up his own phone. or An AU where the Nogistune ordeal happens... differently but Stiles is still cast out. Alas, a string of murders have the pack crawling back for help. Shenanigans ensue.

entry.title: Beacon Hills, a Beacon for Bullshit
entry.summary:
Author: Thymos_2000

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,120Chapters: 20/20Kudos: 63

Summary: Instead of moving to Linora, the Byers and Eleven move to beacon hills. Meanwhile the pack has to deal with split bonds, a new weird family, secrets between each other, trauma, and the two hunters pretending to be cops and their weird friend.
